sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Conjunction / இணைப்புச்சொல்

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Apparently a primary particle, having a copulative and sometimes also a cumulative force; and, also, even, so, then, too, etc.; often used in connection (or composition) with other particles or small words: - and, also, both, but, even, for, if, indeed, likewise, moreover, or, so, that, then, therefore, when, yea, yet.
